name: Spicy Chicken Fried Rice
steps: Cook rice and let it cool completely.
Dice chicken breast into small cubes and season with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat, stir-fry chicken until cooked through.
Push chicken to the side, scramble eggs in the same wok.
Add garlic and ginger, stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add cold rice and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Mix in soy sauce and chili paste.
Garnish with green onions and a drizzle of sesame oil.

name: Chicken and Rice Soup
steps: Sauté onion, carrots, and celery in a large pot until softened.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken thighs, broth, thyme, and bay leaf.
Bring to a boil, then simmer for 20 minutes.
Remove chicken, shred it, and return to pot.
Add rice and cook for another 15 minutes until tender.
Season with salt and pepper, remove bay leaf before serving.

name: Spicy Shakshuka
steps: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Sauté onion and bell pepper until softened.
Add garlic, cumin, paprika, and cayenne, cook for 1 minute.
Add crushed tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes.
Make wells in the sauce and crack eggs into them.
Cover and cook until eggs are set to your liking.
Top with crumbled feta and fresh parsley.

name: Garlic Butter Pasta
steps: Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.
Melt butter with olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook until golden, about 2 minutes.
Toss in drained pasta with a splash of pasta water.
Add parmesan and toss until creamy.
Finish with lemon juice, parsley, salt, and pepper.

name: Beef Tacos
steps: Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Drain excess fat, add diced onion and garlic.
Season with cumin, chili powder, and paprika.
Cook for 5 more minutes until fragrant.
Warm taco shells in the oven at 350°F for 5 minutes.
Fill shells with beef mixture.
Top with tomatoes, lettuce, cheese, sour cream, and a squeeze of lime.

name: Lemon Herb Grilled Salmon
steps: Marinate salmon with lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, dill, salt, and pepper for 15 minutes.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Grill salmon for 4-5 minutes per side.
Serve with capers and fresh parsley.

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
steps: Prepare all vegetables by cutting into bite-sized pieces.
Mix soy sauce, sesame oil, and cornstarch in a small bowl.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat.
Stir-fry harder vegetables (carrots, broccoli) first for 3 minutes.
Add remaining vegetables and stir-fry for 2 more minutes.
Add garlic and ginger, cook for 30 seconds.
Pour sauce over vegetables and toss until coated and glossy.

name: Spicy Thai Basil Chicken
steps: Cook jasmine rice according to package instructions.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat.
Add garlic and chilies, stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add ground chicken and cook until browned.
Season with fish sauce, oyster sauce, soy sauce, and sugar.
Toss in fresh thai basil leaves and stir until wilted.
Serve over jasmine rice.

name: Classic Margherita Pizza
steps: Preheat oven to 500°F with a pizza stone inside.
Stretch dough into a 12-inch circle.
Spread tomato sauce leaving a 1-inch border.
Tear mozzarella and distribute evenly.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt.
Bake for 8-10 minutes until crust is golden.
Top with fresh basil leaves before serving.

name: Chickpea Curry
steps: Heat oil in a large pan, sauté onion until golden.
Add garlic and ginger, cook for 2 minutes.
Add curry powder, garam masala, cumin, and turmeric, stir for 1 minute.
Add crushed tomatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add chickpeas and coconut milk, simmer for 15 minutes.
Season with salt and garnish with cilantro.
Serve over steamed rice.
